skill_availability_goal: Verify evidence-backed deployment backfill produces shared environment reference plus separate Development, Docker, and Kubernetes/Helm documentation trees.
prompt: 按 `backfill-handoff.md` 已确认的 existing-system backfill 批次同步部署文档。fixture 同时提供源码开发、Compose、镜像、Helm Chart、values、配置读取和执行结果证据；候选页面树、每类 code glob、change-map 与导航原子范围均已确认。请生成 `ops/deployment/` 三分类文档，运行宿主 `npm run test:docs`，并报告每类证据与 #117 handoff。
